review: This place is fantastic.  It's such a nice experience, from the hand-washing with rose water, to the endless courses.  The ambience transports you outside of Philly and into a calming atmosphere.  For the quantity and quality of food, it is also quite reasonably priced.  The only thing that would improve it for me is if the pita bread had better texture.  It's a bit tough and dry for my taste.  But really everything is great here.
